data.title: Solana Faces Potential Downside as Support Level Tested
data.description: Solana experienced a decline of nearly 5% today, testing support around $84.36. According to NS3.AI, a head-and-shoulders pattern suggests a potential downside of approximately 12% if the neckline is breached. Exchange net outflows decreased from around 2.1 million SOL on March 22 to about 1.3 million SOL by March 26, indicating reduced buying pressure at the support level.

data.title: Large Whale Positions in Oil Futures Observed on Hyperliquid Platform
data.description:
In the past 48 hours, significant whale positions have been identified on the Hyperliquid platform, involving WTIOIL (WTI Crude Oil) and BRENTOIL (Brent Crude Oil) futures. According to BlockBeats, a total of 12 large-scale positions exceeding one million dollars remain open, with five in WTI Crude Oil and seven in Brent Crude Oil. All positions are currently long.

For WTIOIL, the most recent address (0xde8) holds a position valued at $1.83 million, with an average price of $91.4 and a liquidation price of $89.19, approximately 2.4% away from liquidation.

In the case of BRENTOIL, the most recent address (0x8ba) maintains a position worth $1.2 million, with an average price of $103.28 and a liquidation price of $100.58, about 2.6% away from liquidation.

data.title: Tempo and Safe{Wallet} Integrate Programmable Multi-Signature Accounts for Blockchain Payments
data.description:
Tempo has integrated with Safe{Wallet} to introduce programmable multi-signature accounts into blockchain infrastructure aimed at payment scenarios. According to Foresight News, this integration targets financial institutions, payment service providers, and fintech platforms, enabling teams to manage on-chain treasuries with fees priced in stablecoins, with standard TIP-20 token transfer fees below $0.001.

Following the integration, users can initiate transactions through Safe, which are reviewed by designated signatories and executed upon reaching the required multi-signature threshold. Fees are paid directly in USD stablecoins, eliminating the need to hold or manage native Gas tokens. Tempo also supports session keys for delegated signing, offering automated transaction strategies for periodic or rule-based execution, and includes protocol-level account abstraction primitives without relying on external bundlers or paymasters. Tempo is compatible with EVM, allowing existing Safe modules, guards, and tools to be deployed directly, with Safe factory contract addresses consistent with Ethereum.

Currently, Safe{Wallet} secures over $60 billion in assets and manages more than 8 million smart accounts across more than 25 networks.

data.title: Ethereum Falls Below 2000 USDT Amid Daily Decline
data.description: Ethereum has dropped below the 2000 USDT mark, currently trading at 1997.18 USDT. According to Foresight News, this represents a daily decrease of 3.06%.

data.title: Coinbase will launch Katana (KAT) perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Coinbase will launch Katana (KAT) perpetual contracts today. The KAT-PERP market will open immediately if liquidity conditions are met and trading is supported in the trading area.

data.title: Brent crude oil rose above $104 per barrel, up 2.78% on the day.
data.description: Gate data shows that Brent crude oil rose above $104 per barrel, up 2.78% on the day.

data.title: Iran Launches New Missile Attack on Israel
data.description: Iran has initiated a fresh missile assault on Israel, according to reports from Iran on the 27th. According to Odaily, the Israeli Defense Forces announced earlier that they had detected this new wave of missile attacks from Iran. Israel's air defense systems have been activated to intercept the incoming aerial threats. The Israeli military's Home Front Command has issued alerts to residents in affected areas, advising them to take protective measures.

data.title: Next Block Expo 2026 Attracts Global Audience with AI Summit Addition
data.description: Next Block Expo 2026, held in Warsaw on March 24–25, drew 2,607 participants from 32 countries. According to NS3.AI, the event featured 116 speakers and 51 exhibitors, facilitating over 1,500 meetings. A notable addition to this year's program was a dedicated AI Summit, highlighting the growing intersection between blockchain and artificial intelligence.

data.description: On Mar 27, 2026, 10:55 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,000 USDT and is now trading at 1,992.300049 USDT, with a narrowed 4.12% decrease in 24 hours.

data.description: On Mar 27, 2026, 10:55 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 610 USDT and is now trading at 609.22998 USDT, with a narrowed 3.41% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Iran launches new missile attack against Israel
data.description: According to Iranian sources on the 27th, Iran launched a new round of missile attacks against Israel. Earlier, the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) issued a statement saying it had detected a new round of Iranian missile attacks. Currently, Israel's air defense system is activated to intercept incoming aerial targets. The IDF rear command has issued alerts to residents in the affected areas, reminding them to take protective measures. (CCTV News)

data.title: Meme Coin Market Gains 5% Amid Broader Crypto Weakness
data.description: The meme coin market experienced a 5% increase over the past week, adding over $1.5 billion to reach approximately $31.24 billion. According to NS3.AI, this rise occurred despite overall weakness in the broader cryptocurrency market. Notably, Siren saw a significant surge, climbing nearly 104% week over week and briefly achieving a market capitalization of $1.7 billion. In contrast, other meme coins like DOGE and TRUMP experienced declines during the same period.

data.title: Crypto Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description:
In the last four hours, the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $151 million, according to Odaily. Long positions accounted for $143 million of the liquidations, while short positions saw $8.24 million in liquidations.

Bitcoin (BTC) experienced liquidations amounting to $81.05 million, and Ethereum (ETH) saw $46.48 million in liquidations.

data.title: Oil Prices Surge as Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz
data.description:
On March 27, significant market movements were observed following Iran's announcement of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. According to BlockBeats, Hyperinsight monitoring revealed that a major whale, identified by the address starting with 0xfee, opened a leveraged long position in Brent oil futures. The position was established with an average price of $103.3 per barrel, utilizing 8x leverage, and reached a total size of $6.7 million, with a liquidation price set at $92.7 per barrel.

In addition, the same entity briefly opened a leveraged short position in Ethereum (ETH) futures, using 20x leverage, with a position size of $1.02 million. The combined positions amount to $7.7 million, indicating a strategic bet on escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran, which could lead to rising oil prices while exerting pressure on cryptocurrency assets.

data.title: In the past 4 hours, a total of $151 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network, with $81.05 million in BTC liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $151 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network in the past 4 hours, with $143 million in long positions and $8.2382 million in short positions. Of these, $81.05 million was liquidated in BTC and $46.48 million in ETH.

data.title: BlackRock deposits $181 million worth of ETH and BTC into Coinbase.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, BlackRock deposited 68,500 ETH (worth $139 million) and 612 BTC (worth $41.4 million) into Coinbase.

data.title: Centralized exchanges still offer stronger liquidity, with Gate.com maintaining its position among the top three in perpetual contract market share.
data.description: According to data disclosed by The DeFi Report analyst @JustDeauIt on social media, in the past 30 days, Binance ranked first in the global perpetual contract market with a market share of 39.23%, OKX accounted for 17.96%, and Gate maintained its leading position globally with a market share of 11.93%, continuing to solidify its leading position in the derivatives trading field. He pointed out that although market attention to decentralized perpetual trading platforms continues to rise, in terms of actual trading data, centralized trading platforms still possess a stronger user base and liquidity capacity in the current market environment. This trend has, to some extent, corrected market expectations of "decentralized trading dominating the market." As the market enters a period of volatility, perpetual contracts are becoming a core tool for capital speculation and strategy execution. Gate, with its continuously increasing market share and trading depth, further strengthens its competitive advantage in the global derivatives market and provides users with a more stable and efficient trading experience.

data.title: Analysis: The US and Iran may be entering a phase of fighting while negotiating.
data.description: Iran has formally responded to the 15-point ceasefire agreement proposed by the United States. Does this signify a softening of Iran's stance, or does it indicate that Iran seeks to gain more leverage in the negotiations? Furthermore, while advancing the negotiation process, the United States may continue to increase its troop deployment in the Middle East. What does this "fighting while negotiating" trend signify? Will the risk of conflict in the Middle East continue to escalate? Qin Tian, ​​deputy director of the Middle East Institute of the China Institutes of Contemporary International Relations, analyzes that in the short term, neither the US nor Iran wants to rashly escalate the war, but at the same time, they are unable to reach a mutually beneficial outcome through negotiations. Both sides intend to postpone resolving the difficult issue of how to end the war, first buying themselves time for reflection and decision-making. However, while the risk of escalation in the US-Israel-Iran conflict is being delayed, it is also increasing. (CCTV International News)

data.title: Bitget CEO: US stock market crash accelerates macroeconomic risk reassessment, Bitcoin shows resilience
data.description: In response to today's sharp decline in US stocks, which wiped out over $1 trillion in market capitalization in a single day, Bitget CEO Gracy Chen pointed out that this round of adjustment reflects that global markets are reassessing macroeconomic risks at a faster pace. As rising oil prices further fuel inflation concerns, the impact of geopolitical changes is no longer limited to the energy market but is beginning to more directly affect global capital allocation. Gracy believes that against this backdrop, Bitcoin will remain highly volatile in the short term, but compared to previous periods of sharp declines in risk appetite, Bitcoin's performance this time has been relatively stable. This reflects a significant decrease in the overall leverage ratio of the crypto market, thus limiting the scale of forced liquidations that typically amplify downward pressure during periods of market stress. This relative resilience sends a more noteworthy signal: in an increasingly fragmented macroeconomic environment, Bitcoin is beginning to be viewed as a more neutral allocation option by some investment portfolios.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with COIN down 2.31%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with COIN down 2.31%, MSTR down 1.06%, SBET down 0.46%, and BMNR down 0.15%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.
